title: Remote Sensing and GIS for Assessing the Impact of Integrated Watershed Management
abstract:
The ever-growing population and the resultant demand led to over
exploitation of the finite natural resources in most of the parts of India in general and
in Madllya Pradesh and Rajasthan in particular. The Indian economy is largely a
rural one, hence the development of rural areas depends upon the optimum
management of natural resources particularly the water resources. ...
